setup: Why did the chicken cross the road?
punchline: To get to the other side!

setup: Why did {toy} cross the playground?
punchline: To get to the slide on the other side!

setup: Knock knock! Who's there? Boo. Boo who?
punchline: Don't cry, it's just a joke!

setup: Knock knock! Who's there? Lettuce. Lettuce who?
punchline: Lettuce in, it's freezing out here!

setup: Why did the banana go to the doctor?
punchline: Because it wasn't peeling well!

setup: What do you call cheese that isn't yours?
punchline: Nacho cheese!

setup: I was going to tell a pizza joke, but...
punchline: It was too cheesy.

setup: What is {toy}'s favorite snack?
punchline: Anything you share!

setup: Why did the cow go to outer space?
punchline: To see the moooon up close!

setup: Why didn't the astronaut come to the party?
punchline: They needed a little space.

setup: What does {toy} do on the moon?
punchline: Bounce really, really high!

setup: Why does Saturn have so many rings?
punchline: Because it really likes jewelry!

setup: What spell did the wizard cast on {toy}?
punchline: A giggle spell — and it worked!

setup: Why was the magic wand sad?
punchline: It lost its spark!

setup: How does a wizard do laundry?
punchline: With a spin spell!

setup: What did the magic mirror say to the wall?
punchline: I reflect your good taste!

setup: What's a pirate's favorite letter?
punchline: You'd think it's R, but their first love is the C!

setup: Where does {toy} hide treasure?
punchline: X marks the toy box!

setup: Why don't pirates take showers before they go to sea?
punchline: They just wash up on shore!

setup: What's a pirate's favorite type of math?
punchline: Pi-rate-ical!

setup: Why did the knight have a stomach ache?
punchline: Too much knight food!

setup: Why does {toy} shine the armor every day?
punchline: Because dull adventures are no fun!

setup: Why do dragons brush their teeth?
punchline: To stop fire breath in the morning!

setup: How does a castle say hello?
punchline: It gives you a stone-cold wave!

setup: How do you put an elephant in a fridge?
punchline: Open the door, put it in, close the door!

setup: Why don't cats play piano?
punchline: They prefer to play with the strings!

setup: What kind of pet does {toy} want?
punchline: A very tiny dinosaur!

setup: Why did the duck get in trouble at the restaurant?
punchline: It tried to skip the bill!

setup: What does an owl say when it's late?
punchline: Whooo-rry up!

setup: Why was the little car so tired?
punchline: It was out of gas!

setup: Why couldn't the bicycle stand up?
punchline: Because it was two-tired!

setup: What did {toy} learn in driving school?
punchline: How to honk politely!

setup: Why was the rocket late to the meeting?
punchline: It had to blast off some steam first!

setup: How do submarines keep secrets?
punchline: They keep everything down low!

setup: Why is {toy} the best friend?
punchline: Because they always listen and never interrupt!

setup: What did one balloon say to the other?
punchline: You complete me, friend!

setup: What's the best way to high-five a tree?
punchline: Give it a great big leaf-five!

setup: What did {toy} say when they found a new friend?
punchline: Welcome to the adventure crew!

setup: Why was the thunder so shy?
punchline: It didn't like being the loudest in the room!

setup: What does a cloud wear under its raincoat?
punchline: Thunderwear!

setup: Why did the rainbow visit the bank?
punchline: To check on its pot of gold!

setup: What does {toy} do when it rains?
punchline: Splash in every single puddle!

setup: Why did the drum get a promotion?
punchline: It really knows how to beat the competition!

setup: Why did the piano get locked out of the house?
punchline: It forgot its keys!

setup: What is {toy}'s favorite kind of music?
punchline: Anything with a really good chorus!

setup: Why was the guitar so quiet?
punchline: It was just waiting for its solo!

setup: How do mountains stay warm?
punchline: They wear snow caps!

setup: Where is {toy} exploring today?
punchline: Behind the very curious couch cushions!

setup: Why was the map upside down?
punchline: Because the adventurer was looking for down-under!

setup: Why does the compass have so many friends?
punchline: It always points them in the right direction!

setup: Why did the detective bring a ladder to the case?
punchline: They were looking for high clues!

setup: Why are chemists great storytellers?
punchline: Because they have all the right elements!

setup: Why did the princess wear two crowns?
punchline: Because one is never enough for a royal day!
